mapper.select: SELECT id, notice_id, user_id, read_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM community_notice_read WHERE (#{noticeId} IS NULL OR notice_id = #{noticeId}) AND (#{userId} IS NULL OR user_id = #{userId}) AND (#{readTime} IS NULL OR DATE(read_time) = DATE(#{readTime}))
SELECT id, notice_id, user_id, read_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM community_notice_read WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_notice_read ( notice_id, user_id, read_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{noticeId}, #{userId}, #{readTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.update: UPDATE community_notice_read SET notice_id = #{noticeId}, user_id = #{userId}, read_time = #{readTime}, create_by = #{createBy}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM community_notice_read WHERE id IN (${ids})
